code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple failures within ≤3 months with quality condemnation
    - Safety hazards/complete failure + explicit purchase warnings
    - Replacement units showing identical defects →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Creates new problems (odor/noise) during operation
    - Underperforms competitors significantly despite proper use →2
    - Degrades rapidly after standard maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with conflicted language
    - Temporary solutions requiring imminent replacement →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Maintenance requirements impact convenience per use →4
    - Style praise with functional compromises →4
    - Explicit star deduction for specific flaws →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Exceeds skeptical expectations through core utility →5
    - Solves persistent problems others couldn't →5
    - Maintenance presented as justified tradeoff →5
    - Flaws in non-critical aspects without star deduction →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Requires ironing" + frustration →4 vs "Worth ironing" + enthusiasm →5
    - Comparative phrasing: "Better than expected" →5 vs "Better than bad" →4
    - Long-term updates: "Still works with quirks" →5 vs "Works but degraded" →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. New models are junk!"
<Reasoning>Multiple rapid failures with explicit condemnation</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Underperforms Bissel/Rug Doctor - only surface cleans"
<Reasoning>Negative comparison showing core functional failure</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job temporarily until I can upgrade"
<Reasoning>Temporary solution without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Christmas napkins stay crisp but require frustrating ironing after each wash"
<Reasoning>Maintenance causes active inconvenience</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Cotton napkins need ironing but their elegance justifies the effort"
<Reasoning>Core benefits outweigh maintenance requirements</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Between puppy messes and kids, this cleaner surprised me daily!"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations through performance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Effective scrubber but confusing controls. Deducted one star"
<Reasoning>Explicit star reduction for usability flaw</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Solved 5-year stain problem despite weekly deep cleans"
<Reasoning>Transformative benefit justifies maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Good value but less durable than premium brands"
<Reasoning>Direct comparison with material limitation</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Trash can has every feature I wanted - silent lid perfect for nighttime!"
<Reasoning>Complete feature satisfaction without compromises</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (31 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 8
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 4 -> 3: 1
  gold 1 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "The Boughs of Holly Printed napkins are very Christmassy. They are 100% cotton and are also machine washable. They are also oversized, compared to other napkins. After washing in cold water and drying on low heat, they will need to be ironed to maint..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I can forgive the fact that there was blood on one of the math mats when I opened the package.  Things happen and I'm sorry that someone was injured.  What I can't get past is the fact that there are so many snags.  It's like these two mats were seco..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "returned, will not fit toilet scrubber"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 31 errors, 19 borderline out of 80 examples."}
